case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. JOSE DANIEL ORDONEZ LAGOS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY NANCY ANGEL-HERRERA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT JOSE DANIEL ORDONEZ LAGOS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAGOS, JOSE DANIEL ORDONEZ $470.56 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $585.56 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $570.56 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT LAGOS, JOSE DANIEL ORDONEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
